name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Cup Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
3. Beat together butter, peanut butter, brown sugar, sugar, eggs, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
4. Add dry ingredients and combine thoroughly. Fold in peanut butter cups, peanuts, and chocolate chips.
5. The batter will be stiff. Form into balls about the size of a tablespoon.
6. Place on a greased cookie sheet and bake 12 minutes or until golden.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
